0.q: The presence of plastid-targeted Flv2-Flv4 resulted in significantly less DCFDA fluorescence compared to WT counterparts.

1.q: Flv2-Flv4 expression in stressed plants provides an additional electron sink to the PETC, relieving EEE and increasing the oxidation state of chain components.

2.q: Flv2-Flv4 expression in stressed plants provides an additional electron sink to the PETC, relieving EEE and increasing the oxidation state of chain components.
